title: ALP Package Object
description: Declares a publishable package in the ALP registry/marketplace (v4 Pillar 3). The canonical package manifest is alp-package.json, but a @package object lets a workspace advertise the package it publishes.

namespace.description: Registry namespace (e.g. alp, internal). Defaults to the local registry.

entry.description: Entry .alp file served for the package (e.g. plugin.alp).

dependencies.description: Map of package name to semver range.
